name: Drunken Fish
recipeIngredient: 2 T Olive Oil or Vegetable Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fish by cleaning and seasoning with salt and pepper.
2. In a large skillet or pot, heat olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pan. Cook until softened.
4. Stir in the crushed red peppers, ancho chiles, and cumin. Cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
5. Pour in the dry red wine and add water if needed to reach desired consistency.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer and place the fish on top of the sauce.
7. Gently lower the chopped tomatoes into the pan, covering the fish completely.
8. Season with salt, pepper, sugar, and oregano. Stir well to combine.
9. Cover the pot and allow the fish to cook through for about 15-20 minutes or until it reaches your desired doneness.
10. If using olives, add them during the last few minutes of cooking.
11. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
